title: Resolution Requesting the Uplb Chancellor Dr. Jose V. Camacho, Jr. to Allow Operators/drivers of Jeepneys Performing Public Utility Functions in the Municipality of Los Baños to Take a U-turn at the Uplb Gate of the Campus. (AUTHOR(S): Hon. Janos S. Lapiz, Hon. Geronimo A. Ciceron, Hon. Marlo Pj A. Alipon, Hon Mark Lester B. Dizon, Hon. Rodora P. Loares, Hon. Arlene P. Delos Santos, Hon. Jozylyn N. Manansala, 03/15/2021)
